title: PYPL Free Earnings Preview Analysis 2021
text: PayPal's guidance for FY21 was approximately $4.60 in EPS versus $4.61 consensus. Company was looking for FY21 revenue growth of approximately 18%, or about $25.3-$25.4 billion. TPV growth was expected in the range of approximately 33%-34% at current spot rates. PYPL was heading into the Q4 print with a nearly $205 billion market cap, trading at about 35.5x forward earnings estimates.
